text.title: Generative UI Design Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example: input → procedure → output spec.

input.description: Feature brief + Constraints (brand tokens, must-not-have) + Selected generators + Stakeholder review channel

trace.step: Combine brief + brand tokens + must-not-have into a generator prompt.
Hold review; collect comments + selection vote.
Emit JSON spec labelled ideation-only; hand off to design refinement.

output.code: { "brief_id": "checkout-redesign-2026", "variants_generated": 8, "selected_variant_id": "v0-3", "selection_rationale": "Three-step layout matches existing mental model; cart-summary fixed-position addresses scroll-loss feedback.", "labelled_not_production": true, "refinement_list": [ "Replace placeholder copy with localised strings", "Swap generic icons for brand-token icons", "Verify token contrast on dark mode" ], "generators_used": [ "v0", "claude-artifacts" ] }
